propositions: Remove the emit_legacy_signature_mirror config field and validator from CompactConfig schema, parser, and rebar.toml.
Hardcode never-emit in _snapshot_strip_keys so new snapshots always drop the legacy signature mirror, deleting the emit_legacy_mirror branch.
Preserve the in-memory signature mirror path: process_signature re-derivation and most_recent_attestation fallback must remain unchanged.
Removal is a one-way door that would break external readers on pre-attestations binaries; assert the readiness gate that no pre-attestations binary reads this store before landing.
Update docs/migrations.md legacy signature-mirror retirement section and release notes to record removal of the rollback lever and warn downstream consumers.
